rationale: No qualitative changes directly affecting Romania this cycle; existing risks (US-Iran economic fallout, Russia-Ukraine, Xi-Kim) continue without new developments.

top_events.title: US-Iran war to pull global economy to post-COVID low: World Bank
top_events.summary: Ongoing World Bank warning relevant to Romania's energy-import dependent economy; no new escalation but risk persists.

top_events.title: Xi Jinping arrives in Pyongyang to revitalise China-North Korea ties
top_events.summary: Deepening authoritarian bloc indirectly pressures NATO eastern flank including Romania; continuation of tracked trend.

top_events.title: El Niño under way and threatens weather extremes
top_events.summary: El Niño confirmed; potential for extreme weather events in southeastern Europe including Romania, and indirect commodity price pressure.
